text: Jeremy congratulates you on your new clock!
are you ready for Japan? Trip

Ceva's Theorem: In △ABC, cevians AD, BE, CF concurrent iff (AF/FB)·(BD/DC)·(CE/EA)=1. Ex: If AF=3, FB=2, BD=4, DC=2, then CE/EA=1/3. Menelaus' Theorem: Points D,E,F on sides BC,CA,AB collinear iff (AF/FB)·(BD/DC)·(CE/EA)=-1. Ex: If AF=2, FB=3, BD=1, DC=2, then CE/EA=-3/4.
